tested_steps: Ran `make test` and confirmed 1512 unit tests passed.
Ran `npx playwright test tests/e2e/smoke.spec.ts` and confirmed 11 smoke tests passed.
Ran `make db-push` against RDS Postgres and confirmed Drizzle completed with `No changes detected`.

Verified the live database contains the expected public tables: organizations, user, org_memberships, projects, deployments, pages, api_keys, agent_jobs, assistant_conversations, analytics_events, and audit_logs.

Inserted parent and child records in a transaction, deleted the organization, and confirmed cascading deletes removed memberships, projects, pages, deployments, API keys, agent jobs, assistant conversations, analytics events, and audit logs.
Verified unique indexes reject duplicate organization slugs and duplicate org memberships with Postgres error code `23505`.
Verified enum columns reject invalid `organizations.plan` and `deployments.status` values with Postgres error code `22P02`.

Verified default JSON/JSONB values are correct in practice: organizations.settings `{}`, projects.settings `{}`, pages.frontmatter `{}`, agent_jobs.messages `[]`, assistant_conversations.messages `[]`, analytics_events.data `{}`, and audit_logs.details `{}`.
